title: Property Consultant - Gaurs Group Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Gaurs Group Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Gaurs Group Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Gaurs Group Advisory Limited:
Gaurs Group Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
